title: Is there any API to Create a Customer or Contact in Monday.Com CRM?
excerpt:
Hi, 
Do we have a API in Monday.com to create a Customer or Contact in Monday.Com CRM? 
Please share the API link 
Thanks

posts.author: SamInteg (Samp)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Do we have a API in Monday.com to create a Customer or Contact in Monday.Com CRM?

Please share the API link

Thanks

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SamInteg,

Welcome to the community!

We currently don’t support any mutations to create a new customer, contact, or user via the API. You can find all of the available API queries and mutations in our documentation!

Let us know if you have any other questions!

Best,
Rachel
